/** verifyUserFlag - 短信校验成功后 上报主要是userId */
export interface VerifyUserFlagRequest {
  userId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 校验用户的某个行为标准 */

    | UserFlag

  extraInfo?: string | undefined;
}

  code?: MessageServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?: string | undefined;
}

}

export interface GetUserFlagResponse {
  code?: MessageServiceCommonCode | undefined;
